{{Expand}}

{{Infobox artifact
| name = Ward keys
| introduced = Unsouled
}}

== Unsouled ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-01-unsouled|[[Ward keys]] are polished wooden placards banded with script-circles.<ref name="cradle-01-unsouled-c15">''Unsouled'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Unsouled]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle artifacts]]
